description_long: This is a decorative necklace featuring a central circular pendant adorned with a floral motif, surrounded by small, colored stones or beads. The necklace is strung on a black cord, with alternating white and pink beads flanking the pendant, adding contrast and visual interest. The pendant itself is detailed, with a green central stone encircled by pink and white stones, giving it a vibrant and ornate appearance. The black cord appears braided or twisted, providing a sturdy yet elegant support for the beads and pendant. The overall design is symmetrical, with the pendant as the focal point, and the beads evenly distributed on either side. The necklace is displayed on a black mannequin bust, which accentuates the colors and intricate details of the jewelry.
description: A black cord necklace with a central floral pendant, flanked by alternating white and pink beads, featuring a vibrant and ornate design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full necklace, highlighting the central floral pendant and the arrangement of white and pink beads on a black cord.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the thickness of the cord and the profile of the pendant, with beads partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the black cord wrapping around the neck, with no pendant or beads visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the cord's contour and a partial glimpse of the pendant and beads.
